answer:
Intercom uses Bearer token authentication [1][2]. For all API requests, you must provide your token in the Authorization header: `Authorization: Bearer <TOKEN>` [1][3][4].

You must choose between two methods based on your app type:

Use Access Tokens for private apps accessing your own workspace data. You can generate these in the Developer Hub [1][5].

Use OAuth for public integrations that access other users' data. This requires implementing an authorization flow to exchange a code for an access token using your app's Client ID and Client Secret [1][3][6].
